_note: scenario1_rogue_allocated_bytes is the concrete-path contract (RogueDispatcher.Send_PingRequest is 0-alloc, authoritatively gated at the PipelineExecutor.Execute layer by PipelineExecutorTests.Execute_NoBehaviors_ZeroAllocations (not the generated Send_X method)). The benchmark suite can only measure the public ISender.Send<T> interface path, which boxes one ValueTask<T> by design (PD-12) and measured 384 B / ~184 ns P95 on the ShortRun job (Skylake, .NET 10.0.8). interface_path_ceiling_bytes is the regression tripwire the bench-smoke CI step gates the measured interface-path allocation against (option (a) from the 7.2.1 pass-1 review): it is a generous ceiling on the boxed interface path, NOT the 0-byte concrete-path target. p99 is recorded from BDN's highest percentile (P95) rounded up; BDN does not emit a P99 field. See diary 2026-06-06 plan-change: the concrete 0-alloc path is private on internal RogueDispatcherImpl and not reachable from a consumer assembly to benchmark.
